pr.title: Non-record: Depth recurrence + widening + QAT + sliding window eval

output.summary: Looped 3-block transformer with per-iteration LoRA, ALBERT-style bottleneck, int6 QAT, and sliding-window NTK-scaled eval.
techniques: Looped 3 physical blocks with per-loop LoRA adapters, widened 768-dim GQA, and factorized embeddings
Compile-time STE QAT/inference quantization with configurable compressor and export bits
Sliding-window eval with stride 64 and NTK-aware RoPE scaling for long contexts
